query_normalized: memory palaces in llms: spatial reasoning for enhanced episodic recall computer science
rationale: The paper measures LLMs’ ability to recall structured information (graph recall accuracy), which is a form of episodic recall in the same domain (LLMs) that the user’s question concerns. It therefore provides an empirical baseline for recall performance, satisfying criterion (b) (independent/dependent variable on the same domain) and (c) (empirical baseline).
